Hanoi Secondary
Market Dashboard

Monthly transaction monitor for Hanoi secondary market. The core metric is count distinct scd2_hash by date_y and date_m. High-rise drill-down focuses on Vinhomes Ocean Park and Vinhomes Smart City so sector-level month-on-month change is visible immediately.

Latest reporting month: Latest available month: Total history:

Source

Low-rise Share

Landed-house Share

Market Overview

Fast read of how total secondary transactions move by month, where the asset-class mix changes, and which months show the sharpest month-on-month swing.

Total Transactions by Month

Distinct scd2_hash across all secondary transactions.

Asset Mix by Month

High-rise, low-rise, and landed-house contribution by month.

Month-on-Month Change

Absolute transaction delta versus previous month.

Monthly Snapshot Table

Latest months with total and asset-type mix.

High-rise Deep Dive

High-rise focus group
This section uses Hanoi High-rise Secondary Database.xlsx. It keeps project grouping and sector detail so you can track how Vinhomes Ocean Park and Vinhomes Smart City behave by month.

Transactions by Project Group 2

Monthly distinct transactions for VHOP, VHSC, other Vinhomes, and other projects.

Transactions by Project Group 1

Monthly view of broader high-rise grouping.

Sector Trend

Top sectors by historical transactions inside the selected focus group.

Sector Delta Table

Latest month versus previous month.

Sector Latest Prev MoM MoM % Total history
Assumption in this version: top-line market counts come from Hanoi Secondary Database all.xlsx, while high-rise drill-down uses the dedicated high-rise database for richer fields like project_name_group1, project_name_group2, and sector_name. If the newest calendar month is still in progress, headline cards and sector delta default to the latest completed month.

Low-rise Focus

Low-rise focus project
This section tracks low-rise secondary transactions for Vinhomes Ocean Park 1, 2, 3, and Vinhomes Global Gate. Sector-level detail uses sector_name where it is available in the source file.

Transactions by Focus Project

Monthly distinct transactions for the four low-rise focus projects.

Low-rise Sector Trend

Top sectors inside the selected low-rise project.

Low-rise Sector Delta

Latest month versus previous month.

Sector Latest Prev MoM MoM % Total history

Landed-house Focus

This section tracks landed-house secondary transactions by district, then drills into ward-level change for the selected district.

District Trend

Ward Trend
